Text: Pursue Apyaahi
Aid your allies
Aid your allies
Defeat the mycotender
Repel the mycotender's attack
Defeat Apyaahi
We have to take care of these beasts before going after Apyaahi!
Over here, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>!
I need help over here!
As I feared... My creatures cannot live up to the real thing.
How about this?
A tenacious lot, aren't you? Well, I suppose I wouldn't want you to fall too quickly.
There are so many...but we will persevere!
I can smother them in flames. Lend me your protection!
Scheming, are we? Don't think I'll allow you to do as you please.
No! My poor, pitiful pets!
So I cannot rely on numbers alone... Keep them distracted, my darlings!
We'll be fine. Go after Apyaahi!
I might be in trouble...
Something a little different this time. Behold the fruits of my travels across Tural.
Thanks for the help! Now to catch Apyaahi!
Don't think you've won yet.
You're strong, to be sure. But so is <Emphasis>this</Emphasis>!
Send your worst─I won't lose!
Don't hold back! My medicines will keep you upright!
Limits are just more rules to be broken!
That doesn't look good...
Worry not. Get behind me, and you'll be safe!
You...you survived that!?
Bah, even bugs squirm before they die. This time I'll finish things!
You're as stubborn as the mud stuck to my sandals... Yet that alone is not enough to─ What?
Something's gotten into them...
I admit... I may have underestimated you lot.
And while defeating you would be quite the feather in my cap, the gates of Tuliyollal are a much easier target...
Curses, she's making a run for it! Follow her, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>!
Anything that would obstruct the free world I aim to create will be destroyed!
Go forth, my prickly punisher, and crush those who would bind us!
...My, but what is this sudden, dreadful feeling...? Perhaps I haven't been sleeping well as of late.
Impressive. I expected no less of you. But this farce ends here!
Now, smash <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>him</If> to a pulp!
I don't think so!
So you find comfort in fellowship. At least this will save me the trouble of killing you one by one.
This is your moment, my pointy pugilist!
Ungh... It's getting even stronger!
<Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, we are at your back! Together we'll repel this foul creature!
Keep going, everyone!
How...how can you stand before the treasure's might!? What are you!?
Such power...power that would be welcome within the Passage of the Unbound!
Victory is mine! Now do you know the beauty of true freedom!?
Do not falter, my spiky soldier!
Gather around <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, everyone!
Can you withstand this!?
Spread out, or we'll be swept away!
You scurry about like rats! Pulverize them with this, my barbed barbarian!
Is this...poison? Stay away from it!
No... Even my spiny savior has fallen...
Grrr! I'm not finished yet! I can replenish my ranks!
Crush them underfoot!
I'll end this in a single blow!
Attacking from above!? Devious...
Leave the skies to me. The rest of you, focus on the big one!
No, I think not.
